signal.title: When AI turns software development inside-out: 170% throughput at 80% headcount
signal.reason: The headline directly addresses AI's disruptive impact on a core industry (software development) with highly specific, impressive quantitative signals (170% throughput, 80% headcount). These metrics are invaluable to investors/technologists assessing efficiency gains, ROI, and market shifts driven by AI.

signal.title: Arcee AI goes all-in on open models built in the U.S.
signal.reason: Highlights a startup's significant strategic commitment to a major AI model trend (open) with a clear geopolitical/talent focus (U.S.), providing critical signals for market dynamics, competitive positioning, and funding implications.

signal.title: Why can’t TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
signal.reason: Highly relevant. The headline highlights a critical real-world challenge for a major platform (TikTok) concerning AI model capabilities (generation vs. detection). This signals potential market gaps for startups in AI detection/content authenticity, influences funding decisions, and offers insights into the maturity and limitations of current AI models and their large-scale deployment.
